个.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 亻 ('person') + phonetic 固.

们.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 亻 ('person') + phonetic 門.

中.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a flagpole (interpreted as a drum-bearing pole placed in the center of a field); Shuowen alternatively describes it as a vertical stroke through 口 indicating center.
中.difference: We classify 中 as simple_indicative (指事); Wiktionary classifies it as a Pictogram (象形) depicting a flagpole.

来.wiki_summary: Pictogram of wheat (original character of 麥/麳); later borrowed phonetically for 'to come'.

上.wiki_summary: Ideographic/indicative: short horizontal stroke above a long arc, contrasting with 下.

大.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a person facing forward; original form of 夫, phonetically borrowed for 'big'.

为.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 又 ('hand') + 象 ('elephant') — a hand holding/leading an elephant; 又 later became 爪.
为.difference: We classify 爲 as a pictograph (depicting monkeys); Wiktionary classifies it as an ideogrammic compound of 又 (hand) + 象 (elephant).

和.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 禾 + semantic 口 ('mouth'), conveying harmony.

国.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound; the k-prefix derivation of 域 ('boundary; territory'), cognate with 閾 and 囿.
国.difference: We classify 國 as compound_ideograph (会意, 囗 + 或); Wiktionary classifies it as a phono_semantic_compound derived from 域.

地.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 土 ('earth') + phonetic 也.
